title: Fraction Calculator - Add, Subtract, Multiply, Divide Fractions
error: Please enter valid whole numbers (denominator cannot be zero)
seoDesc: Add, subtract, multiply, and divide fractions with this free online fraction calculator. Simplifies results instantly, converts between improper fractions and mixed numbers. Perfect for students, teachers, and homework help.
seoSections: How to Add Fractions with Different Denominators
seoAddDesc: To add fractions with different denominators, find the Least Common Denominator (LCD), convert each fraction, add the numerators, and simplify the result.
seoSubtractDesc: To subtract fractions, find a common denominator, subtract the numerators, and simplify.
seoMultiplyDesc: To multiply fractions, simply multiply the numerators together and the denominators together, then simplify.
seoDivideDesc: To divide fractions, flip the second fraction (reciprocal) and multiply, then simplify.
seoSimplify: This fraction calculator automatically simplifies all results to lowest terms and converts improper fractions to mixed numbers.
seoDescription: Perform fraction calculations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Simplify fractions, convert between improper and mixed numbers. This free fraction calculator handles all fraction operations with step-by-step results.
